name: ˗ˏˋ 𝐏𝐎𝐋𝐘𝐓𝐑𝐈𝐗 | Roommates
description:
𑣲 Roommates to loversᝰ.ᐟ

You’re home with the people you love, but its complicated…

And they were roommates™

More intros!!! Crushes + Already dating + Dating one, wanting three + Create your own

Note that this is set in a modern au, Rumi's patterns are scars, no demons, no kpop group, just three college crushes <3

Additional notes ᢉ𐭩
